name: 十三香小龙虾
description: Persistent message-twin engine with self-modeling, reply drafting, and explicit persona council analysis.

learning.enabled.label: Learning Enabled
learning.enabled.help: Allow the plugin to learn from eligible private conversations and explicit feedback.

learning.scope.label: Learning Scope
learning.scope.help: Which conversations may feed the twin model.

models.defaultMode.label: Default Twin Mode
models.defaultMode.help: Default model-selection mode when tools do not specify one.

models.aspirationalWeight.label: Aspirational Weight
models.aspirationalWeight.help: How much the ideal-self model should influence hybrid decisions.

autonomy.mode.label: Autonomy Mode
autonomy.mode.help: Execution guardrail policy for the decision twin.

autonomy.autoSendEnabled.label: Auto Send Enabled
autonomy.autoSendEnabled.help: Allow low-risk private reply drafts to become auto-send candidates.

autonomy.autoSendConfidenceThreshold.label: Auto Send Threshold
autonomy.autoSendConfidenceThreshold.help: Minimum confidence required before a draft reply can be auto-send eligible.

storage.path.label: Storage Path
storage.path.help: SQLite path template used for each agent's 十三香 state database.
